I do not have permission to use the Bash tool in this session. The Bash tool is what I need to execute the `cat` heredoc command you specified.

**What I was trying to do:** Execute the exact `cat > ... << 'ENDOFFILE'` heredoc command you provided to write the file `C:\Users\User\Documents\citedby-v3\src\pages\app\ApiDeveloper.tsx` with the specified content.

**Why I need this permission:** The command you requested is a bash shell command (`cat` with a heredoc), and the Bash tool is the only way I can execute shell commands. My other available tools (like file reading/writing) might be alternatives, but the Bash tool permission is currently denied.
